explanation: King, Queen, Jack, and Ace are all integral cards within a standard 52-card French-suited deck. The Joker is an additional card often included with a deck, but it is not part of the standard 52-card count.

category: Units of Length Derived from Human Body Parts
explanation: Foot, Yard, Span, and Hand are all traditional units of length historically derived from the dimensions of the human body. The Meter, however, is a unit of length defined scientifically, originally as one ten-millionth of the distance from the North Pole to the Equator.

Depend, Rely, Insist, and Focus are all verbs commonly followed by the preposition 'on' (e.g., 'depend on', 'rely on', 'insist on', 'focus on'). Believe is typically followed by 'in' (e.g., 'believe in').
